headline: Hastra protocols with verified audit scope and GitHub repositories; mainnet program IDs and live token addresses not yet enumerated
short_headline: Audit-scope contracts identified; mainnet addresses pending

findings.text: Block-explorer search for Solana program names blocked by fetch limitations; Solscan URL returned no content. One PRIME token address located via search: 3b8X44fLF9ooXaUm3hhSgjpmVs6rZZ3pPoGnGahc3Uu7, but live program IDs not enumerated.
No official deployments documentation page located at hastra.io. Website fetches only return landing page metadata. DeFiLlama page references protocol on Solana but does not list contract addresses.

Audit PDF provides full scope: two Solana programs (vault-mint and vault-stake) audited in two phases. Initial audit Sep 24 – Oct 3, 2025 (separate repos at commits b881f84 and 4bbc0b3). Follow-up audit Nov 2025 on consolidated hastra-sol-vault repo at commit 0b55b4a. All findings resolved per audit summary.

GitHub repository provenance-io/hastra-sol-vault-stake archived Oct 31, 2025. README includes example devnet deployment addresses and PDA derivation patterns but no mainnet program IDs. Anchor-based Solana program with TypeScript deployment scripts. Separate vault-mint repository referenced in audit was not located during this run.
Protocol operates on single chain: Solana mainnet. No multi-chain deployments indicated in audit or website.
No factory or pool-enumeration contracts identified. Hastra consists of two core programs (vault-mint, vault-stake) with no dynamic child contract generation.

Role taxonomy: audit references Config PDA (admin), Vault Authority PDA (fund holder), Mint Authority PDA (token minter), Freeze Authority PDA (token controller), and separate Freeze/Rewards Administrator lists (admin actors). Mainnet instances not yet located.
No admin_addresses entries can be populated without verified mainnet deployment locations. Devnet example addresses in GitHub README are not eligible (not from live mainnet fetch).

rationale.verdict: Discovery blocked by inability to enumerate mainnet program IDs and contract addresses on Solana. Audit scope and repository structure are well-documented; off-chain sources (audit PDF, GitHub, website) confirm two Solana programs (vault-mint, vault-stake) with consolidated codebase. PRIME token exists (3b8X44fLF9ooXaUm3hhSgjpmVs6rZZ3pPoGnGahc3Uu7 on Solscan). However, no mainnet Solscan pages fetched successfully, and no official deployments documentation exists at protocol website. Next run inherits GitHub repos and PRIME token address for targeted Solscan exploration.

evidence.shows: Protocol website landing page; no deployments documentation or contract address links.

Figure Q3 2025 Informal Systems audit. Two Solana programs in scope: vault-mint and vault-stake. Initial audit Sep 24–Oct 3, 2025 on separate repos (hastra-sol-vault-mint commit b881f84, hastra-sol-vault-stake commit 4bbc0b3). Follow-up Nov 2025 on consolidated hastra-sol-vault at commit 0b55b4a. All findings resolved.
Audit follow-up revision commit 0b55b4a for hastra-sol-vault (consolidated repository).

Archived Solana program repository. Demonstrates vault-stake program structure with Config, UnbondingTicket, RewardsEpoch, ClaimRecord accounts; freeze/thaw and rewards administrator roles; PDA-based authority pattern. Devnet example addresses: Mint 7Ei9b4A5MqddAT5gtjW4frRXuwk2iNefU6NMUaqQraqg, Vault Token Account Dz4nct4PowiRpiKrUEShc3vyTKVaPLo8aKcFYYqrUgdq. Archived Oct 31, 2025.
PRIME token on Solscan (Hastra PRIME token address). Page fetch failed but URL verified via search; token exists on Solana mainnet.

unknowns: D1-offchain: Solscan block-explorer pages for Hastra program IDs did not return content. No named program tags found for vault-mint or vault-stake on Solscan.
D2-offchain: hastra.io/docs, /deployments, /addresses, and /contracts pages do not exist or are not linked from homepage.
D4: hastra-sol-vault-mint GitHub repository (separate from hastra-sol-vault-stake) referenced in audit at commit b881f84 not located under provenance-io or other accessible org.
D6: Mainnet vault-token mint address (wYLDS) not yet enumerated; cannot check for token inflation or related contracts.
D8: Zero mainnet admin addresses located. Devnet examples in GitHub README not eligible (not live mainnet state).

protocol_metadata.about: Hastra is a Solana-based RWA (real-world asset) protocol developed in partnership with Figure Technologies and Provenance Blockchain Foundation. It consists of two interconnected Solana programs (vault-mint and vault-stake) that enable users to deposit USDC-backed wYLDS tokens and earn yield through liquid staking in the PRIME token, backed by Figure's home equity lending operations.
